exam_price_notes: Standard registration $925. Early registration discount and military discount available.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Prometric authorized test centers. Online proctoring available.

id_requirements: One government-issued photo ID with first and last name. Name must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. On-screen financial calculator provided (HP 10BII+ or similar). Personal calculators are NOT allowed. Scratch paper provided. No notes or reference materials. Proctor monitors via webcam and screen share for online testing.
renewal_options: Complete 30 CE hours every two years, including 2 hours of CFP Board-approved ethics CE. Pay annual certification fee. Agree to CFP Board's Standards of Professional Conduct.

prerequisites.description: 6,000 hours of professional experience in financial planning OR 4,000 hours in an apprenticeship pathway
Completion of a CFP Board-registered education program covering the financial planning principal knowledge topics
Bachelor's degree (or higher) from an accredited college or university (may be completed after passing the exam but before certification)

retake_policy.notes: Maximum 4 lifetime attempts at the CFP Exam. Candidates who fail 4 times must petition the Board of Examiners for additional attempts. Exam offered 3 times per year (March, July, November).

official_study_resources.title: CFP Exam Blueprint
official_study_resources.notes: Free downloadable exam blueprint with principal knowledge topics and weightings

official_study_resources.title: CFP Board Practice Exam
official_study_resources.notes: Available through CFP Board-registered education programs
